## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` pasa
- [ ] Spec en `docs/specs/` si el cambio no es trivial
- [ ] Smoke iOS (`npx expo run:ios`) si toca UI nativa / HealthKit
- [ ] Sin secretos en el diff (`.env`, URLs reales, tokens)
